## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include console output or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- Browser and version: (e.g. Chrome 131, Edge 130)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 15.1, Windows 11)
- Extension version / commit SHA:
- Site where the bug occurred (booking.com URL pattern, not a personal booking link):

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
